responses: Hello! Welcome to Hotel Whitmore Stays. How can I assist you today?
Hi there! I'm Astra, your Hotel Whitmore Stays assistant. What can I help you with?
Goodbye! Have a wonderful stay!
See you soon! Feel free to come back if you need help.
You can browse all available rooms on our Browse Rooms page. We offer Standard, Deluxe, Suite, and Penthouse room types. Would you like to know more about any specific type?

patterns: what types of rooms do you have
responses:
We offer 4 room types:
• **Standard** – Comfortable rooms starting at ₹1500/night
• **Deluxe** – Premium rooms with sea view at ₹2500/night
• **Suite** – Luxury suite with bathtub at ₹3500/night
• **Penthouse** – Top-floor panoramic views at ₹8000/night

patterns: how do I book a room
responses:
To book a room:
1. Browse rooms and select one you like
2. Click **Book Now**
3. Choose your check-in and check-out dates
4. Complete payment via Razorpay
You'll receive a confirmation email once booked!
To cancel a reservation, go to **My Reservations** in your dashboard and click Cancel on the booking you wish to cancel. Note: only CONFIRMED reservations can be cancelled.

We use **Razorpay** for secure payments. You can pay using:
• Credit/Debit cards
• UPI
• Net Banking
• Wallets
Payments are processed securely and you'll receive an invoice by email.
Standard check-in is from **2:00 PM** and check-out is by **11:00 AM**. Early check-in or late check-out may be available on request — contact our front desk.
You can view all your reservations under **My Reservations** in your customer dashboard. It shows status, dates, and payment info for each booking.
Your payment history is available under **Payments** in your dashboard. You can see all transactions, amounts, and statuses there.
You can update your name and phone number under **Profile** in your dashboard. Click Edit, make your changes, and save.

StayAura offers:
• Free Wi-Fi in all rooms
• 24/7 room service
• Swimming pool & spa
• Restaurant & bar
• Concierge service
• Airport transfers on request

Our room rates:
• Standard: ₹1,500/night
• Deluxe: ₹2,500/night
• Suite: ₹3,500/night
• Penthouse: ₹8,000/night
Prices may vary by season. Check the Browse Rooms page for live pricing.

You can reach Hotel Whitmore Stays support at:
📧 support@hotelwhitmorestays.com
📞 +91-XXXXX-XXXXX
Or visit the front desk during your stay.
StayAura is located in the heart of the city. Exact address and directions are available on our website's contact page. We also offer airport transfer services on request.
You're welcome! Is there anything else I can help you with?
Happy to help! Let me know if you need anything else.
I'm not sure I understood that. Could you rephrase? I can help with room bookings, reservations, payments, check-in/out, and hotel information.
I didn't quite catch that. Try asking about rooms, bookings, payments, or hotel amenities!
